text.title: embeddings-model-selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embeddings-model-selection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Choosing the top MTEB model without testing on domain data, then discovering 10% recall gap in production.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: MTEB measures average retrieval quality across general domains. Domain shift (legal, financial, scientific, code) can reverse model rankings entirely. Benchmark first, always.

failure-mode.description: Embedding drift: switching embedding model or updating model version without re-embedding the entire corpus.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Embedding spaces are model-specific. Mixed-model vector stores produce unpredictable similarity scores because the geometric relationships between vectors differ. No partial migration is possible — re-embed everything or keep the old model.
